text: ‘To complete your fathers’ reckoning’, by killing the Son of God, as their fathers had killed his prophets: cf. 21.38.
See Gen. 4.10, and II Par. 24.20. Barachias will have been the name of some ancestor of Zacharias, son of Joiada; there can be no reference to the persons mentioned in Is. 8.2, Zach. 1.1.
vv. 1-36: Much of this is also to be found in ch. 11 of St Luke.
